stemHtml: The Airborne Weather Radar (AWR) is displayed on a coloured screen showing the different contours associated with thunderstorms. What procedure should be adopted to avoid a thunderstorm using the AWR?

options.a: The areas that have the worst precipitation are coloured yellow and they should be avoided at all times.
options.b: Fly towards the area where the contours are the steepest and avoid any areas that are yellow.
options.c: Fly on the upwind side of the thunderstorm and avoid red or magenta coloured areas.
options.d: Aim to avoid the thunderstorm by at least 5NM so as to avoid any turbulence.
